x-enumeration-literals.name: Insurer (Insurance Company)
x-enumeration-literals.description: The company that provides coverage, assumes the risk, and pays out claims.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Policyholder
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person or entity that owns the policy and pays premiums.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Insured Life or Person
x-enumeration-literals.description: The individual whose life, health, or property is covered.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Beneficiary
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person(s) or entity who receive the benefit or payout when a claim occurs.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Intermediary / Broker / Agent
x-enumeration-literals.description: A licensed professional who sells the policy, advises clients, and facilitates the agreement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulator or Authority
x-enumeration-literals.description: The government body overseeing insurance companies to ensure compliance and protect consumers.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Claims Assessor or Officer or Adjuster
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Internal party (within the insurer) responsible for evaluating the validity and entitlement of a claim.

The person responsible for:

verifying claim
reviewing claim evidence
determining eligibility

x-enumeration-literals.name: Claimant
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The person who initiates the claim.

Could be:

beneficiary
policyholder
funeral service provider
executor/administrator of estate

x-enumeration-literals.name: Claims Processor or Claims Administrator
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Operational role executing:

claim registration
updates
documentation
payments queueing

x-enumeration-literals.name: Claim Approver
x-enumeration-literals.description: Authorizes the claim decision based on rules and assessment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Underwriter
x-enumeration-literals.description: Evaluates and accepts the risk before issuing the policy.
